svg.title: Enterprise AI asset management reference architecture infographic
svg.desc: One-page leadership brief showing the three-layer architecture (metamodel, marketplace, governance), five AI asset types, lifecycle states, GitHub marketplace design, Microsoft Purview integration, and enterprise capability model for governing AI primitives with OASF classification.
svg.text: Reference architecture for enterprise AI primitives
OASF classification · GitHub marketplace · Microsoft Purview governance
Five entity types classified by OASF
Agent → invokes → Skill · Agent → governed_by → Instruction · Agent → grounded_in → Knowledge · Orchestration → composed_by → Agent

g.text: Build OCI artifact → push to ACR → tag CID
Purview label → Data Map lineage → DLP eval

svg.text: Agent inherits the highest classification of any dependency

g.text: Governance must be embedded in the development workflow — not bolted on after deployment
OASF Record + Governance Overlay in every PR · Purview sync in every CI/CD pipeline · Compliance as code

svg.text: Josh Garverick · Chief Technical Architect, Xebia · April 2026
